prose.example: Kila kithibitishaji lazima atoe ushuhuda ili mtandao ufikie mwafaka.

attestation.notes: In Swahili, 'ushuhuda' captures the 'witnessing' aspect of consensus attestations.

prose.example: Tumia daraja kuhamisha mali zako kutoka mtandao mkuu kwenda kwa Tabaka la 2.

bridge.notes: Standard Swahili term for both physical and technical bridges.

prose.example: Ugatuzi ni sifa kuu ya mtandao wa Ethereum inayozuia udhibiti.

decentralization.notes: 'Ugatuzi' is the standard administrative and political term for decentralization in Swahili.

prose.example: Ethereum ni mfumo wa kigatuzi ambapo hakuna mamlaka kuu.

decentralized.notes: Uses the '-a' association particle followed by the adverbial noun form.

prose.example: Ni gharama nafuu kusambaza mkataba mwerevu wakati wa ada ndogo za gesi.

deploy.notes: In software, 'kusambaza' (distribute/spread) is common, though 'kupeleka' (send/place) is also used.

prose.example: Ufinali unahakikisha kuwa miamala haiwezi kubadilishwa tena.

finality.notes: 'Ufinali' is a technical loan-construction. 'Uamuzi wa mwisho' is more common but less specific.

prose.example: Mchepuko wa mtandao hutokea wakati watumiaji wanaposhindwa kukubaliana kuhusu mabadiliko ya itifaki.

fork.notes: 'Mchepuko' (deviation/branch) is better for technical contexts than 'uma' (dining fork).

prose.example: Utawala wa kigatuzi unaruhusu wamiliki wa tokeni kupiga kura kuhusu mapendekezo.

governance.notes: Standard term for governance and administration.

prose.example: Hashi ya kitalu inaunganisha kitalu kipya na kile kilichopita.

hash.notes: Technical loanword adapted to Swahili phonology.

prose.example: Mchimba anapokea zawadi kwa kuongeza kitalu kipya kwenye mnyororo.

miner.notes: Based on 'chimba' (to dig/mine). 'Mchimba' is the standard agent noun.

prose.example: Uchimbaji unahitaji nguvu nyingi za kopyuta ili kutatua mafumbo ya hisabati.

mining.notes: Abstract noun (U- class) for the process of mining.

prose.example: Unaweza kufua NFT mpya kwa kutumia mkataba mahiri.

mint.notes: 'Kufua' traditionally means to forge/mint metal/coins; 'Kutengeneza' (to make) is more general but widely understood.

prose.example: Sahihi yako ya kidijitali inahitajika ili kuidhinisha muamala huu.
Weka dau la ETH ili uweze kuwa mthibitishaji kwenye mtandao.

stake.notes: 'Dau' is commonly used for a stake or wager.

prose.example: ETH iliyowekewa dau haiwezi kutolewa hadi muda wa kufunga uishe.

staked.notes: Passive participle construction: 'which has been staked'.

prose.example: Kila mwekaji dau anapata tuzo kwa kusaidia usalama wa mtandao.

staker.notes: Agent noun for the person staking.

prose.example: Uwekaji dau ni mbadala wa uchimbaji katika Ethereum.

staking.notes: Abstract noun (U- class) for the act of staking.

prose.example: Unaweza kubadilisha ETH kwa tokeni nyingine kwenye DEX.
Muamala wako umethibitishwa kwenye mtandao.

transaction.notes: Standard financial term used across East Africa (e.g., in mobile money).

prose.example: Mthibitishaji anapokea zawadi kwa kulinda mtandao na kuthibitisha miamala.

validator.notes: Mthibitishaji is the formal Swahili term for one who validates/confirms.

prose.example: Unapaswa kupiga kura yako ili kushiriki katika maamuzi ya utawala.
Upigaji kura kwa ajili ya pendekezo jipya umeanza.

voting.notes: Abstract noun referring to the process of voting.

prose.example: Ethereum ni jukwaa la kidijitali linalotumia teknolojia ya blockchain.
Mkataba huu unaelezea masharti ya ushirikiano.
Bloku mpya huongezwa kwenye mnyororo kila baada ya sekunde chache.

block.notes: Commonly used loanword in Swahili technology contexts.

prose.example: Mkataba werevu hufanya kazi kiotomatiki bila mpatanishi.

smart contract.notes: 'Werevu' is used to translate 'smart' in the sense of intelligent/clever for Class 3 nouns.

prose.example: Kila nodi inahifadhi nakala kamili ya blockchain ya Ethereum.
Unaweza kutuma tokeni zako kwa mtumiaji mwingine kupitia mkoba wako.
Hakikisha unanakili anwani yako ya Ethereum kwa usahihi.
ETH ndiyo sarafu asilia inayotumika kulipia miamala kwenye mtandao wa Ethereum.

eth.notes: Often kept as ETH or Ether in technical contexts.

prose.example: Blockchain ni rejista ya kidijitali ambayo hurekodi miamala yote kwa njia salama.

blockchain.notes: While 'Mlolongo wa mizuia' is the literal translation, 'Blockchain' is the standard industry term in Swahili.

prose.example: Unahitaji kuunda akaunti ya Ethereum ili kuanza kutuma na kupokea ETH.
Data zote za miamala zinahifadhiwa kwenye mnyororo mkuu.

chain.notes: Standard Bantu root for physical or metaphorical chains.

prose.example: Itifaki ya Ethereum inafafanua jinsi nodi zinavyopaswa kufanya kazi katika mtandao.
Hakikisha unahifadhi maneno yako ya siri mahali salama nje ya mkoba wako.

wallet.notes: Mkoba is the common word for a wallet/bag; widely used for digital wallets in fintech.

prose.example: Unapaswa kuongeza kikomo cha gesi ili kuhakikisha mwamala wako unatekelezwa.
Teknolojia ya rollup inaruhusu miamala mingi kuunganishwa na kusindika nje ya mnyororo mkuu.

rollup.notes: Technical term usually kept in English.

prose.example: EIP ni hati inayoelezea sifa mpya au mabadiliko kwenye itifaki ya Ethereum.
Kandarasi hii inahitaji usawa wa kutosha kabla ya kutekelezwa.

require.notes: In code/smart contracts, this translates to a condition or 'sharti'.

prose.example: Web3 inaruhusu watumiaji kumiliki data na utambulisho wao kidijitali.
Solidity ni lugha kuu ya programu inayotumika kuandika mikataba ya kiakili kwenye Ethereum.
Mkataba wa kiakili hutoa tukio wakati muamala unapokamilika.

event.notes: In Swahili, 'tukio' is the standard word for event/occurrence.

prose.example: Data zote za onchain zinapatikana kwa umma kwenye kizuizi.

onchain.notes: Technical term usually kept as 'onchain' in Swahili tech contexts, though 'kwenye mnyororo' is the literal translation.

prose.example: Ether ni sarafu ya asili ya mtandao wa Ethereum.
EVM inafanya kazi kama kompyuta moja kubwa ya kimataifa.
Dapp ni programu inayofanya kazi kwenye mfumo wa mnyororo wa kizuizi.

decentralized application (dapp).notes: 'Kugatuliwa' is the standard Swahili term for decentralized.

prose.example: Kila NFT ina utambulisho wa kipekee ambao hauwezi kunakiliwa.
Wasanidi programu wanatumia API kuunganisha programu zao na mtandao wa Ethereum.
Uhamisho wa Ether unahitaji ada ya gesi ili kutekelezwa.

transfer.notes: In UI contexts, 'Hamisha' (the imperative/short form) is often used for buttons.

prose.example: Unaweza kuanzisha utoaji wa ETH yako kutoka kwenye mkataba wa hisa.

withdrawal.notes: Refers to the process of removing funds from the consensus layer.

prose.example: Mtandao wa Ethereum hufikia muafaka kupitia itifaki ya uthibitisho wa hisa.
Shughuli zote za thamani halisi hufanyika kwenye Mainnet ya Ethereum.

mainnet.notes: Usually kept as a proper noun in technical contexts.

prose.example: Shughuli za offchain husaidia kupunguza gharama na kuongeza kasi.

offchain.notes: Used without a hyphen as per instructions.

prose.example: Tokeni nyingi kwenye Ethereum hufuata kiwango cha ERC-20.
Orakali huleta data ya bei ya ulimwengu halisi kwenye mikataba mahiri.
Miamala ya blob hupunguza kwa kiasi kikubwa gharama za Layer 2.

blob.notes: Technical term, often kept as is or Swahilized as 'blobu'.

prose.example: Katika kila sloti, mthibitishaji mmoja huchaguliwa kupendekeza kitalu.

slot.notes: Specific 12-second time window in Ethereum consensus.

prose.example: DAO inaruhusu jumuiya kufanya maamuzi bila uongozi mkuu.
Unapaswa kujaribu mkataba wako mahiri kwenye testnet kabla ya kuupeleka kwenye Mainnet.
Mteja wa maafikiano anasaidia mtandao kufikia uamuzi mmoja kuhusu hali ya mnyororo.

consensus client.notes: In Swahili, 'mteja' refers to a client/customer; used here in the technical sense of client software.

prose.example: Safu ya pili inasaidia kupunguza ada za miamala kwa kufanya miamala nje ya mnyororo mkuu.
Teknolojia ya ZK inaruhusu kuthibitisha habari bila kufichua data yenyewe.

zk.notes: Usually kept as an abbreviation ZK in Swahili technical contexts.

prose.example: Usishiriki kamwe ufunguo wako wa siri na mtu yeyote ili kulinda pochi yako.
Watu wengi wanatumia kripto kwa malipo ya kimataifa ya haraka.

crypto.notes: A loanword widely accepted in Swahili media.

prose.example: Ethereum ni mfano wa safu ya kwanza ambapo usalama wa msingi unapatikana.
MEV inahusu faida ya ziada ambayo wachimbaji au wathibitishaji wanaweza kupata.

maximal extractable value (mev).notes: Direct translation of the technical concept; often kept as MEV.

prose.example: Mthibitishaji lazima aombe kujiondoa kabla ya kutoa kiasi chake cha amana.

exit.notes: Refers to the process of leaving the validator set.

prose.example: Kila opcodi katika EVM inawakilisha kazi fulani ya kompyuta.

opcode.notes: Swahili phonetic spelling of the technical term 'opcode'.

prose.example: DeFi inaruhusu ufikiaji wa huduma za kifedha bila kuhitaji benki ya jadi.
Faragha ni muhimu katika kulinda utambulisho wa watumiaji kwenye mtandao.

privacy.notes: Commonly used for both personal and data privacy.

prose.example: Optimistic rollup inasaidia kupunguza gharama za miamala kwa kuichakata nje ya mnyororo mkuu.

optimistic rollup.notes: Technical term usually kept in English or translated descriptively.

prose.example: ERC-20 ni kiwango kinachotumika zaidi kwa kutengeneza tokeni kwenye Ethereum.

ethereum request for comments (erc).notes: Usually kept as an acronym ERC.

prose.example: Plasma ni suluhisho la kiwango cha pili linalotumia minyororo ya watoto.
Wasanidi programu wanaweza kutumia maktaba zilizopo ili kupunguza urudiaji wa kodi.

library.notes: In Swahili, 'maktaba' belongs to the N-class where singular and plural are often identical.

prose.example: The Merge ilikuwa hatua muhimu iliyohamisha Ethereum kwenda kwenye Proof-of-Stake.

the merge.notes: Specific historical event in Ethereum; proper noun status is preferred.

prose.example: Uthibitisho wa ufahamu sufuri unaruhusu kuthibitisha ukweli bila kufichua siri yenyewe.
Upatikanaji wa data ni hitaji la msingi kwa usalama wa minyororo ya kiwango cha pili.
Mikataba janja hutoa logi ili kuruhusu programu za nje kufuatilia matukio.

log.notes: 'Logi' is a loanword from English; 'kumbukumbu' is more general Swahili for records/memory.

prose.example: Beacon Chain ilianzisha Proof-of-Stake kwenye mfumo wa Ethereum.

beacon chain.notes: Proper noun for the consensus layer component.

prose.example: Ukwasi unaruhusu watumiaji kubadilisha mali moja kwenda nyingine bila kuathiri bei kwa kiasi kikubwa.

liquidity.notes: Standard financial Swahili term for liquidity.

prose.example: Katika Ethereum, kila epoch inajumuisha seti ya vipindi vya muda vinavyoitwa slots.

epoch.notes: Commonly kept as a technical loanword in blockchain contexts.

prose.example: Ethereum Mainnet ndio mtandao wa msingi ambapo miamala ya kweli hufanyika.

ethereum mainnet.notes: Proper noun, usually not fully translated.

prose.example: Wamiliki wa tokeni wanaweza kupiga kura kwenye pendekezo jipya la uboreshaji.
Mpendekeza kitalu huchaguliwa kwa nasibu ili kuunda kitalu kipya katika mtandao.
Tabaka la makubaliano linahakikisha kuwa node zote zinakubaliana juu ya hali ya mtandao.
Kila mshirika katika mtandao wa Ethereum anashiriki data na washirika wengine.
Wasanidi programu hutumia JSON-RPC kuingiliana na node za Ethereum kupitia programu zao.
Nonce inahakikisha kuwa muamala mmoja hautumiki mara mbili.

nonce.notes: Technical term usually preserved in Swahili.

prose.example: IPFS inatumika kuhifadhi picha za NFT kwa njia isiyo na kituo.
Nodi kamili huhifadhi nakala nzima ya blockchain ya Ethereum na kuthibitisha miamala yote.

full node.notes: In Swahili, 'nodi' is a loanword typically treated as an N-class noun, which remains invariant in plural forms.

prose.example: Teknolojia ya ujuzi sifuri inaruhusu kuthibitisha taarifa bila kufichua data yenyewe.

zero-knowledge.notes: Direct translation of 'zero-knowledge' as 'ujuzi' (knowledge) and 'sifuri' (zero). Often used in the context of ZK-rollups.

prose.example: Hardhat ni mazingira ya uendelezaji yanayotumiwa na watengenezaji wa Ethereum.

hardhat.notes: Proper noun for a development tool; remains untranslated.

prose.example: Kituo cha ukaguzi husaidia kuzuia mabadiliko kwenye historia ya blockchain baada ya muda fulani.

checkpoint.notes: Uses the Ki-Vi noun class for 'kituo' (station/point) and 'ukaguzi' (inspection/audit).
